title: ToolTreaux 9 Inch Heavy Duty Revolving Leather Hole Punch Tool 2.0-4.5mm
description:
An essential tool for many leather working projects, whether you’re designing a pair of shoes or a dog collar, this leather hole punch tool features 7 different revolving punches, comfortable handling with compound design and works well with a variety of different leathers. Featuring an ergonomic grip for comfort and control, the leather working tool also includes a compound joint that can be employed by using just one hand, allowing you to create stronger, cleaning punches while keeping your other hand free for placement, leverage and alignment support. The punch heads were hardened to get through even the toughest of leathers and are rotatable for ease of use, as opposed to removable heads that go missing or are difficult to keep organized

ToolTreaux 9 Inch Heavy Duty Revolving Leather Hole Punch Tool 2.0-4.5mm

An essential tool for many leather working projects, whether you’re designing a pair of shoes or a dog collar, this leather hole punch tool features 7 different revolving punches, comfortable handling with compound design and works well with a variety of different leathers. Featuring an ergonomic grip for comfort and control, the leather working tool also includes a compound joint that can be employed by using just one hand, allowing you to create stronger, cleaning punches while keeping your other hand free for placement, leverage and alignment support. The punch heads were hardened to get through even the toughest of leathers and are rotatable for ease of use, as opposed to removable heads that go missing or are difficult to keep organized.

HOW TO USE: mark the desired location where the hole will be made; rotate the punch head until the desired punch is in line with the brass anvil; unlock the handle, then place and align the leather piece in the punch; squeeze the handle firmly until the punch pierces through the leather

Key Features

  • HEAVY DUTY REVOLVING LEATHER PUNCH TOOL: An essential tool for many leatherworking projects, whether you’re designing a pair of shoes or a dog collar, this leather hole punch tool is heavy duty, features 7 different revolving punches, comfortable handling with compound design and works well with a variety of leathers
  • ERGONIMIC LEATHER HOLE PUNCH DESIGN: Featuring an ergonomic grip for comfort and control, the leatherworking tool also includes a compound joint that can be employed by using just one hand, allowing you to create stronger, cleaning punches while keeping your other hand free for placement, leverage and alignment support
  • VERSATILE LEATHERWORKING TOOL: Create holes in belts, clothing, watch bands, handbags, DIY crafts and more, this heavy duty revolving leather hole punch tool can be used on a wide variety of projects; the included revolving punch sizes are: 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5, 4 and 4.5 millimeters
  • LEATHER PUNCH TOOL USAGE: Mark the desired location where the hole will be made; Rotate the punch head until the desired punch is in line with the brass anvil; Unlock the handle, then place and align the leather piece in the punch; Squeeze the handle firmly until the punch pierces through the leather
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 5.5 x 12.2 x 9.2; Punch Sizes: 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5, 4, 4.5 millimeters; Material: Steel, Brass, Plastic; Color: Black, Red

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTLPTOOL1
  • UPC: 810058483102
  • Color: Red
  • Size: Large

Measured in millimeters, the punch sizes are 2, 2.5, 3, 3.5, 4 and 4.5

FEATURES:

- Hardened Punch Heads - 6 Replaceable Screw On Punch Tips - Easy to Use Revolving Head - Revolving Head Clicks to Hold Punches Firmly Place
